description: A modern, white filing cabinet with a grey granite-patterned countertop and three drawers. Each drawer has a sleek, silver handle. The cabinet is supported by small, clear casters, indicating it is mobile. Its clean lines and neutral color palette suggest it would fit well in a variety of office or home environments, providing functional storage with a contemporary aesthetic. The granite top adds a touch of sophistication and practicality, offering a durable surface.
